title: Code Geass: Lelouch of the Rebellion (R1)
description: Season 1 of Code Geass.

title: Code Geass: Lelouch of the Rebellion (R2)
description: Season 2 of Code Geass.

title: Code Geass: Lelouch of the Re;surrection
description: Following the Zero Requiem, C.C. resurrects Lelouch to help rescue a kidnapped Nunnally from the militant Kingdom of Zilkhstan.

title: Eighty Six (86) part 1 + part 2
description: The Republic of San Magnolia claims its war is fought by unmanned drones. In reality, they are piloted by a persecuted minority called the 86, who are forced to fight and die on the front lines.

title: Steins;Gate + Steins;Gate 0 + Special + Movie
description: Steins;Gate follows Okabe Rintarou, a self-proclaimed mad scientist, and his friends in the Future Gadget Laboratory who accidentally discover that their modified microwave can send text messages to the past.

title: Spice and Wolf S1 and S2
description: The peddler Kraft Lawrence travels through the world selling all kinds of things. After visiting a village, he discovers a sleeping girl under the pelts in his cart. She has wolf ears and a tail. The wolf girl explains that she has been called a god, but that her name is Holo and nothing more.

title: Rosario to Vampire (S01+02+Bonus) [Uncensored]
description: By a bizzare coincidence, Tsukune Aono has accidentally gotten himself admitted to a youkai academy, a school attended by monsters. Just when he thinks he'll run away from there, he meets the beautiful girl Moka and his mood turns ultra happy. However, she transforms into her true form when the rosary on her chest is taken off, she's a super vampire!

title: True Tears s1+ OVAs
description: Shinichiro is a student living in what would be a dream come true for most high school boys, but for him is mostly a frustration. A well liked girl in school named Hiromi has lived in his house for a year along with his family. Her father was a close friend of the family, and when he died they immediately took her in.

title: RIN Daughters of Mnemosyne
description: Rin Asogi is an immortal private detective with a thirst for vodka and a talent for attracting things that go bump in the night. In a series of nightmarish vignettes spanning sixty-five years, Rin's lush body is sadistically pierced, blown up, and mulched to a bloody pulp. The fiend behind her tortured existence is Apos, an eternal being obsessed with sacrificing Rin to Yggdrasil, the tree of all life.

title: Aria The Animation S1+S2+S3+OVAs  Natural, Origination, Avvenire
description: Drift peacefully into Neo Venezia, a city on the planet Aqua (formerly known as Mars). By the 24th century, humans have found a way to colonize the previously uninhabitable planet. As futuristic as that sounds, Neo Venezia is still teeming with rustic beauty; gondolas on wide canals and waterways are the main mode of transportation. The city itself is a faithful replication of Manhome’s (the planet formerly known as Earth) Venice.

title: Sayonara Zetsubou Sensei S1+S2+S3+OVA
description: More crazy antics abound as Nozomu Itoshiki, a.k.a Zetsubou-sensei, who is the worlds most negative person, tries to teach class 2-H about how life is filled with despair and darkness. A harder task than it first may seem, with his students being far from ordinary themselves.

title: Shigofumi
description: After death people can send final messages called shigofumi letters to the living expressing feelings they never shared. Fumika Mikawa delivers these letters with her partner Kanaka. Though shigofumi carriers are supposed to be dead and unchanged Fumika is different as she continues to age hinting at a deeper mystery.

title: They Are My Noble Masters
description: Ren Uesugi and his sister Mihato leave home due to family troubles and move to the city with little money. They find work as servants in the Kuonji mansion serving the three sisters Shinra Miyu and Yume while getting involved with the other staff and their friends.

title: H2O: FOOTPRINTS IN THE SAND
description: Takuma Hirose is a blind high school boy who moves to a village to recover his sight. There he meets several girls including Hayami Hinata and Otoha who briefly restores his vision. As he uses his sight to help others he uncovers painful secrets and learns why Hayami is hated while trying to support her

title: Minami-ke
description: The Minami household follows three sisters Haruka Kana and Chiaki living on their own as they handle daily life together from chores to school and friends with plenty of humor and lively moments along the way

title: Minami-ke: Okawari
description: The second season of Minami-Ke. It picks up where the first season left off, and just like the first season, it's about the daily lives of the three Minami sisters, Haruka, Kana and Chiaki, and their school friends.

title: Minami-ke: Okaeri
description: A year later the Minami sisters are a bit older but still the same at heart Haruka is caring and responsible Kana is lazy and causes trouble and Chiaki is clever and teasing Despite their differences they care deeply for each other as they go through daily life filled with humor trouble and growing responsibilities

title: Minami-ke: Tadaima
description: The Minami sisters continue their everyday life with Chiaki teasing everyone while admiring Haruka Kana stays clueless about Fujiokas crush and Haruka keeps avoiding Hosakas attention as they end each day together at home enjoying simple moments

title: Gunslinger Girl (S1-S2+OAV)
description: Gunslinger Girl follows orphaned girls remade into cyborg assassins by a secret agency, carrying out deadly missions while quietly longing for warmth, identity, and genuine human connection with their handlers.

title: Major All Seasons + OVA
description: Goro Honda is a little boy who is obsessed with baseball. As a child, he watches his father, a professional baseball player, be removed from the Blue Oceans’ main team due to a shoulder injury that left him unable to pitch again. However, since his son looks up to him more than anyone else in the world of baseball, Goro's father decides that he can't quit just yet

title: Hatenkou Yuugi
description: See the world With these words, Rahzel, the daughter of a rich family, is kicked out of her house and sent on her journey. Along the way she meets up with Heat and Alzeid, two men with very different personalities but very similar journeys.
